description: Dense high-resolution landscape fixture used for README previews and lattice-size inference regressions.
notes: Use this when testing dense higher-resolution pixel art that already has a coherent lattice but still fools the current size inference search.
The tracked phase-field output was produced from a fixed 512x512 lattice and is kept around so README preview generation does not depend on rerunning that exact pass.
The current automatic lattice guess on the source fixture undershoots badly at 251x251, which makes this a useful regression case for future inference work.
